shooting__easy__drill_2.label: 5m box — right corner cone, R foot to L corner

shooting__easy__drill_3.label: 5m box — left corner cone, L foot to R corner

shooting__medium__drill_2.label: Thierry Henry — left (L foot to L corner)

shooting__medium__drill_3.label: Thierry Henry — right (R foot to R corner)

shooting__hard__drill_2.label: Lamine Yamal — far post left (L foot curl from right side)

shooting__hard__drill_3.label: Lamine Yamal — far post right (R foot curl from left side)

passing__easy__drill_3.label: Medium range passing — 3m, lean forward, 1 touch then pass

passing__medium__drill_1.label: One-touch passing — wall in front 3m, slight lean forward

passing__medium__drill_2.label: Medium range strikes — wall in front 3m, slight lean back

passing__hard__drill_1.label: Pass through 3 gates — wall behind 1.5–2m, gates in front 3m

passing__hard__drill_2.label: Low driven pass through 3 gates — same layout, laces strike

passing__hard__drill_3.label: Long passes into boxes — near 10m, far 12m offset

dribbling__tight_control__drill_1.label: Straight 10 — weave through 10 cones 1 foot apart

dribbling__tight_control__drill_3.label: Ronaldinho — densely packed random cones, freestyle

dribbling__change_of_direction__drill_1.label: Wide zigzag — 3 + 2 offset cones, 2m vertical, 1m horizontal

dribbling__change_of_direction__drill_2.label: L-drill — sprint A→B, chop at B, sprint to C

dribbling__acceleration__drill_1.label: Speed turns — sprint A→B, execute turn, return

dribbling__acceleration__drill_2.label: L-turns — sprint A→B, chop at B, sprint to C (2–3m each)

dribbling__acceleration__drill_3.label: High speed train — 50m sprint, ball one stride ahead

dribbling__change_of_tempo__drill_1.label: Cones to acceleration — 3 tight then burst to far cone

dribbling__change_of_tempo__drill_2.label: Acceleration to cones — burst then decelerate into 3 tight

dribbling__change_of_tempo__drill_3.label: Skill moves to acceleration — execute skill then 50m sprint

dribbling__skill_moves__drill_1.label: Skill zigzags — execute skill move at each cone

dribbling__skill_moves__drill_2.label: 3 explosive skills — Y-shape, skill at junction then explode to B/C/D

dribbling__skill_moves__drill_3.label: Freestyle square — use all skills, imagine defenders

dribbling__anticipation__drill_1.label: Elite 10 straight — random chime triggers 3-cone burst

dribbling__anticipation__drill_2.label: Anticipation zigzag — chime triggers burst for 3 cones

dribbling__anticipation__drill_3.label: Anticipation freestyle — chime = intensity burst in square

upper_body_strength__exercise_1.label: Iso hold chin-up — jump to top, hold 10s, lower

upper_body_strength__exercise_2.label: Elevated push-ups — explosive concentric, slow eccentric

upper_body_strength__exercise_3.label: Med ball chest pass — controlled push and catch

lower_body_strength__exercise_2.label: Lunge — 5/3/3 reps, front knee above ankle

lower_body_strength__exercise_3.label: Sidelying leg raises — 2s up, 1s hold, 2s down

speed_training__block_1__exercise_2.label: Wall ISO spring hold — ball of foot, 10s

speed_training__block_1__exercise_3.label: Wall march — controlled alternating leg drive

speed_training__block_1__exercise_4.label: Wall hip switch — quick alternating leg switch

speed_training__block_1__exercise_5.label: Wall run — maximum speed in place, maintain 45° position

speed_training__block_2__exercise_1.label: Pogo jumps — straight up and down, stiff ankles

speed_training__block_2__exercise_2.label: Forward / back jumps — over a line, reactive

speed_training__block_2__exercise_3.label: Lateral jumps — side to side over line, two feet

speed_training__block_2__exercise_4.label: In-out jumps — feet together then wide, alternating

speed_training__block_2__exercise_5.label: Split stance quick switch — scissor feet in air

rhythmic_movement__block_1__exercise_1.label: Two-foot ankle bounce — one contact per beat

rhythmic_movement__block_1__exercise_2.label: Alternating foot tap — L-R-L-R each beat

rhythmic_movement__block_1__exercise_4.label: Lateral shuffle step — accent on arrival at cone

rhythmic_movement__block_1__exercise_5.label: Skip pattern — BIG hop + small step, 2-beat cycle

rhythmic_movement__block_2__exercise_1.label: Hip sway bounce — hips L/R on beats 1 and 3

rhythmic_movement__block_2__exercise_3.label: 360° bounce turn — 90° per beat, 4 beats = full circle

rhythmic_movement__block_2__exercise_4.label: Wave arms walk — full arm wave every 2 steps

rhythmic_movement__block_3__exercise_1.label: Slow-fast bounce — instant gear change every 8 beats

rhythmic_movement__block_3__exercise_2.label: Freeze and burst — musical accent = freeze then burst

rhythmic_movement__block_4__exercise_1.label: Ball tap bounce — tap on every 3rd beat

rhythmic_movement__block_4__exercise_2.label: Dribble to freeze — accent = freeze with ball under control

rhythmic_movement__block_4__exercise_3.label: Tempo dribble — slow × 8 → skill → burst (Messi pattern)

rhythmic_movement__block_4__exercise_4.label: Partner mirror dribble — leader dribbles, partner mirrors

football_intelligence__A.label: Focal point A — movement off the ball

football_intelligence__B.label: Focal point B — first touch and body position

football_intelligence__C.label: Focal point C — pressing and defensive shape

football_intelligence__D.label: Focal point D — transitions (3 seconds after possession change)
